sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Compare before and after frames
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes']
after = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']

# Summarize both states
def summarize(nodes):
    for n in nodes:
        if n['color'] != 'g':  # skip gray background
            boundary = n['boundary']
            rows = [p[0] for p in boundary]
            cols = [p[1] for p in boundary]
            print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} center≈({sum(rows)//len(rows)},{sum(cols)//len(cols)}) children={n['children']}")

print("BEFORE:")
summarize(before)
print("\nAFTER:")
summarize(after)

# Find differences
before_ids = {n['id'] for n in before}
after_ids = {n['id'] for n in after}
print(f"\nNew ids: {after_ids - before_ids}")
print(f"Removed ids: {before_ids - after_ids}")

# Check color changes
for n in after:
    if n['id'] in before_ids:
        bn = next(x for x in before if x['id'] == n['id'])
        if n['color'] != bn['color'] or n['pixels'] != bn['pixels']:
            print(f"id={n['id']} changed: color {bn['color']}->{n['color']}, pixels {bn['pixels']}->{n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
